name: French Fudge
recipeIngredient: 13 oz (1 cup) skim milk evaporated milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the evaporated milk, cornstarch, sugar replacement, and chocolate chips in a saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring until the mixture thickens and the chocolate chips are melted.
3. Whip the cream cheese until light and fluffy.
4. Beat the whipped cream cheese into the chocolate/mixture.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Pour the mixture into a buttered 8-inch square baking dish.
7. Chill until firm.
8. Cut into 1-inch squares.
9. Store in the refrigerator.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/4 Bread Exchange; Calories: 18
